top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Gain as Crude Oil Drops on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Global stocks rose to record highs as crude oil fell after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows. The dollar weakened.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fortescue begins construction on 690MW solar farm in Pilbara
top_signals.summary: The Turner River solar farm represents the final solar installation required to deliver the company’s Real Zero decarbonization plan.
